label: PASS
rationale: Write=False requests a Read-Only session, and explicit SP changes in such a session shall not be permanent; the later ACE Get returns the preexisting Admins value, not the read-only Set value.

label: FAIL
rationale: The read-only session Set changed ACE BooleanExpr, an explicit table cell update, and the later Get shows that read-only change persisted after EndSession.

label: PASS
rationale: The read-only Set attempted to change Authority Uses from 1 to 0, but explicit SP changes in Read-Only sessions shall not persist; the later Get correctly returns 1.

label: FAIL
rationale: The later Authority Get returns 0, matching the Set performed in a Write=False session, but explicit changes made during Read-Only sessions shall not be made permanent.
